problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway
hypothesis: Combining CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
